Row.Text: Canal-waters teem with the call of market vendors, and the air is sharp with roasting spices - this is Siam. Bending, but never breaking, the Siamese take in what they can. And when they cannot, they fit war elephants with machine guns. Chaiyo, Siam - survive, adapt and prosper.
Siam grows like mai pai, like forest bamboo. It bends with the changing winds, it does not break.

The Uparat Unique Civilian has a variety of effects that get stronger with every City-State you become Suzerain of. Start befriending those Independent Powers, or else you may lose them to your rivals.

[BLIST][LI][B]-75% [icon:YIELD_FOOD]Food and [icon:YIELD_GOLD]Gold[/B] on specialized [B][icon:YIELD_TOWNS]Towns[/B].[LI][B]+100% [icon:YIELD_GOLD]Gold[/B] in [B][icon:YIELD_CITIES]Cities[/B].[LI][B]+4 [icon:YIELD_FOOD]Food[/B] in [B][icon:YIELD_TOWNS]Towns[/B] for every [B][icon:YIELD_CITIES]City[/B].[LI][B]+30% [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION]Production[/B] towards the [B]Lion Gate[/B].[/BLIST]

[BLIST][LI][B]-75% [icon:YIELD_FOOD]Food and [icon:YIELD_GOLD]Gold[/B] on specialized [B][icon:YIELD_TOWNS]Towns[/B].[LI][B]+100% [icon:YIELD_GOLD]Gold[/B] in [B][icon:YIELD_CITIES]Cities[/B].[LI][B]+4 [icon:YIELD_FOOD]Food[/B] in [B][icon:YIELD_TOWNS]Towns[/B] for every [B][icon:YIELD_CITIES]City[/B].[LI][B]+30% [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION]Production[/B] towards the [B]Lion Gate[/B].[/BLIST]
+30%[icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production from being Mycenae’s associated Wonder.
Grants +10 [icon:YIELD_GOLD]Gold for each [icon:RADIAL_RESOURCES]Resource acquired when creating a naval [icon:TRADE_ROUTE]Trade Route.
Mycenaean Unique Infantry Unit. Heals +10 HP from Pillaging any tile. Suffers no [icon:Action_Move]Movement penalties from Embarking or Disembarking.
Mycenaean Unique Infantry Unit. Heals +10 HP from Pillaging any tile. Suffers no [icon:Action_Move]Movement penalties from Embarking or Disembarking.
Tier 2 Mycenaean Unique Infantry Unit. Heals +10 HP from Pillaging any tile. Suffers no [icon:Action_Move]Movement penalties from Embarking or Disembarking.
Tier 3 Mycenaean Unique Infantry Unit. Heals +10 HP from Pillaging any tile. Suffers no [icon:Action_Move]Movement penalties from Embarking or Disembarking.

Mycenaean Unique Quarter. Created by constructing the Megaron and the Cyclopean Wall in the same District. +1 [icon:YIELD_FOOD]Food, [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION]Production, and [icon:YIELD_GOLD]Gold on Fortifications in this Settlement.

Mycenaean Unique Quarter. Created by constructing the Megaron and the Cyclopean Wall in the same District. +1 [icon:YIELD_FOOD]Food, [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION]Production, and [icon:YIELD_GOLD]Gold on Fortifications in this Settlement.
Mycenaean Unique Production Building and Fortification. +3 [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION]Production. +1 [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION]Production adjacency for Wonders. Ageless.
Mycenaean Unique Production Building and Fortification. +3 [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION]Production. +1 [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION]Production adjacency for Wonders. Ageless.
Mycenaean Unique Happiness Building. +3 [icon:YIELD_HAPPINESS]Happiness. +1 [icon:YIELD_GOLD]Gold adjacency for Quarters and Wonders. Ageless.
Mycenaean Unique Happiness Building. +3 [icon:YIELD_HAPPINESS]Happiness. +1 [icon:YIELD_GOLD]Gold adjacency for Quarters and Wonders. Ageless.
Ut dolor odio, vulputate id auctor ut, suscipit et tellus. Vestibulum scelerisque.
Ut dolor odio, vulputate id auctor ut, suscipit et tellus. Vestibulum scelerisque.
Ut dolor odio, vulputate id auctor ut, suscipit et tellus. Vestibulum scelerisque.
Ut dolor odio, vulputate id auctor ut, suscipit et tellus. Vestibulum scelerisque.
Commanders receive the Zeal and Looting Promotions for free.
When one of your Land Military Units defeats an enemy Unit, gain [icon:YIELD_GOLD]Gold equal to 100% of its [icon:NAR_REW_COMBAT]Combat Strength.
